# 👋 Hi, I'm Saumya Jain ### 🚀 Data Enthusiast | Building AI Solutions
--- ## 💫 About Me
### 🎯 What Drives Me - 🔍 Transforming raw data into actionable insights - 🧪 Experimenting with ML models and pipelines - 🏗️ Building production-ready AI solutions - 📈 Continuous learning through hands-on projects ### 🚀 Currently Exploring - 🧠 **Deep Learning** architectures - ⚙️ **MLOps** best practices - 🤖 **LLMs** and generative AI - 📊 **Model optimization** techniques - 🔄 **End-to-end ML** workflows
--- ## 🛠️ Tech Arsenal
